goal: Rewrite opensearch as a pnpm monorepo with a standalone API, a Vite web client built with shadcn and Jotai, and an Expo mobile client with no legacy plugin or MCP compatibility layers.
principles: Thin clients over a typed API

phases.title: Shared packages: contracts, prompts, sources, core, sdk, testkit
HTTP and SSE API with persistent threads
Vite web app with shadcn, Jotai, and Perplexity-like UX
Expo mobile app with shared SDK and Jotai state
Remove legacy code, refresh CI, run validation
